race.comment: The maiden stayers kick us off. BOMB PERIGNON (4) is unlucky to still be a maiden finishing runner-up at her past three outings and strikes a very winnable contest here. Lloyd sticks in the irons following that last-start placing over this track and trip and maps ideally for this from gate three. Rates the testing material against this line-up. SHOW'EM WHO'S KING (2) has hit the frame at the past couple of efforts and looks to be building up to a maiden victory. Looms as the main danger. FIVE OF US (14) put in a career-best performance when second over this course and distance last time out and only needs to repeat that effort to be playing a major role in the outcome. STEPLIKA LION (9) has been thereabouts in all four starts this campaign and may earn some minor money again. MISS FIRESTAR (10) next best after a little freshen-up.
